value.found_quote: The `--agents` flag accepts JSON with the same frontmatter fields as file-based subagents: `description`, `prompt`, `tools`, `disallowedTools`, `model`, `permissionMode`, `mcpServers`, `hooks`, `maxTurns`, `skills`, `initialPrompt`, `memory`, `effort`, `background`, `isolation`, and `color`.
value.name: Background: run an agent as a non-blocking background task
